era: 1989-1996 core. Psychedelic Rock. E=5 -- fuzz, reverb, psychedelic haze. U-District. Sub Pop.
associated_musicians: Presidents of the United States of America (Jason Finn)

theory_nodes.concept: Sub Pop psychedelic wing. Love Battery occupies the psychedelic corner of a grunge catalog -- Blue Cheer and Spacemen 3 more than Mudhoney.
theory_nodes.description: The psychedelic outlier on the grunge label.

theory_nodes.concept: Jason Finn dual membership: Love Battery + Presidents of the USA. PUSA 1M+ debut while Finn still in Love Battery.
theory_nodes.description: Psychedelic to pop-rock: one drummer, two worlds.

theory_nodes.concept: U-District as incubator. First U-District band in engine. The Ave: bars, records, cheap rent, midnight reverb.
theory_nodes.description: University District enters the engine at 221.

cross_references.relationship: E=5 holds. Capitol Hill to U-District. Island to Sub Pop. Crystalline to fuzzy.
E rises to 6. Psychedelic to Alternative Rock. U-District to Seattle.

sps_pair.pairing_note: FIRST ACCIPITRIDAE. Both E=5. Elevated: music reaching upward through fuzz/reverb; eagle watching from height.
